message:
test(golden): freeze .beads/ directory layout post-init baseline (beads_rust-hnpo)

Add tests/golden_beads_init.rs with 5 tests that snapshot the .beads/
directory after a fresh `br init --prefix bd`:

- golden_init_directory_listing: insta snapshot of sorted file listing
  with text file sizes and binary markers (WAL/SHM excluded as transient)
- golden_init_text_contents: insta snapshot of all text file contents
  (.gitignore, config.yaml, issues.jsonl, metadata.json)
- golden_init_issues_jsonl_empty: asserts JSONL starts empty
- golden_init_metadata_valid_json: validates metadata.json structure
- golden_init_expected_file_set: asserts exact set of core files

Uses assert_cmd for br invocation, walkdir for deterministic traversal,
insta for snapshot comparison. Binary SQLite files are listed by name
only (no size/content) to avoid nondeterminism.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+---
+source: tests/golden_beads_init.rs
+expression: listing
+---
+.beads/
+  .gitignore  (532 bytes)
+  beads.db  [binary]
+  config.yaml  (92 bytes)
+  issues.jsonl  (0 bytes)
+  metadata.json  (62 bytes)

@@ -0,0 +1,57 @@
+---
+source: tests/golden_beads_init.rs
+expression: contents
+---
+--- .gitignore ---
+# Database
+*.db
+*.db-journal
+*.db-shm
+*.db-wal
+
+# Lock files
+*.lock
+
+# Temporary
+last-touched
+*.tmp
+
+# Local history backups
+.br_history/
+
+# Sync state (local-only, per-machine)
+.sync.lock
+sync_base.jsonl
+
+# Merge artifacts (temporary files from 3-way merge)
+beads.base.jsonl
+beads.base.meta.json
+beads.left.jsonl
+beads.left.meta.json
+beads.right.jsonl
+beads.right.meta.json
+
+# Daemon runtime files
+daemon.lock
+daemon.log
+daemon.pid
+bd.sock
+sync-state.json
+
+# Worktree redirect file
+redirect
+
+# bv (beads viewer) lock file
+.bv.lock
+--- config.yaml ---
+# Beads Project Configuration
+# issue_prefix: bd
+# default_priority: 2
+# default_type: task
+--- issues.jsonl ---
+<empty>
+--- metadata.json ---
+{
+  "database": "beads.db",
+  "jsonl_export": "issues.jsonl"
+}
